dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your hub for GEO-optimized content—start with a new draft or pick up where you left off.
dashboard.continueDesc: Input → Generate → Edit → Publish. Open the generator to follow the guided steps.
dashboard.trendingSubtitle: What people are searching and talking about—by city.
dashboard.trendingFootnote: Relative interest vs. regional baseline (example signals, updated weekly).

generator.title: Content Generator
generator.subtitle: Create GEO-optimized, on-brand copy in English and Finnish.
generator.industryHint: Pick the closest match—this steers tone and GEO references.
generator.industryHintTitle: AI uses industry to choose idioms, compliance tone, and local competitors to avoid.
generator.geoHint: City, region, or country for local SEO.
generator.outputHint: Output tabs will match your selection.
generator.defaultPrompt: Write a friendly Instagram caption for our winter blend, highlighting ethical sourcing and free shipping in the Helsinki area this week.
generator.imagePlaceholder: Image placeholder — add creative in editor
generator.bottomTip: Tweak location or audience, then Regenerate for sharper GEO phrasing.

sample.enP1: This week, our winter blend celebrates small farms and big flavor—roasted here, delivered to your door across the capital region with free shipping.
sample.enP2: Tap “ethical sourcing” in Stories to see the journey. ☕ #HelsinkiCoffee #WinterBlend
sample.fiP1: Tämän viikon talvisekoitus yhdistää pienet tilat ja isot maut—paahdettu täällä, toimitettuna kotiin pääkaupunkiseudulla ilman toimituskuluja.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Track drafts, schedules, and performance at a glance.

brand.title: Brand Profile
brand.subtitle: Keep voice and visuals consistent across every campaign.
brand.voiceHintTitle: We map voice to a style profile the generator applies to every channel.
brand.guidelinesDefault: We never claim medical benefits. Prefer ‘crafted in Finland’. Avoid superlatives unless sourced.
brand.logoDrop: Drop PNG or SVG here (max 2 MB)
brand.noFiles: No files yet. Upload photos, past ads, or packaging.
brand.previewSocialBody: We roast in Helsinki and ship carbon-neutral across Finland—because “local” should mean the whole supply chain, not just the label.
brand.previewEmailSubject: Subject: Your winter cup is ready
brand.previewEmailBody: Hi Alex—this week’s roast highlights honeyed chocolate notes from our partner farm. Order by Sunday for free delivery in the Helsinki metro.
brand.previewBlogTitle: Why GEO matters for specialty coffee
brand.previewBlogBody: Searchers in Turku and Tampere use different words than in Helsinki. Mapping your content to real regions helps you show up when it counts—without sounding generic.

analytics.title: Analytics & GEO Insights
analytics.subtitle: See where content resonates and how languages compare.
analytics.tip1Body: Mention a neighborhood in the first sentence for stronger GEO relevance.
analytics.tip2Body: Use “tilaa” / “order” the way locals search in FI.
analytics.tip3Body: Keep EN/FI CTAs aligned—same offer, native idioms.

multilingual.title: Multilingual editor
multilingual.subtitle: Work in English and Finnish side by side.
multilingual.syncHintTitle: When on, structural changes mirror across languages. Always review native phrasing.
multilingual.syncNote: Edits may still need native review.
multilingual.compareSample1: Winter warmth, shipped from Helsinki → Talven lämpöä suoraan Helsingistä
multilingual.compareSample2: “ethical sourcing” → “eettinen hankinta” (consider “eettinen alkuperä” for social tone)
multilingual.enSample:
Winter warmth, shipped from Helsinki

This week, our winter blend celebrates small farms and big flavor—roasted here, delivered to your door across the capital region with free shipping.

Tap “ethical sourcing” in Stories to see the journey. ☕ #HelsinkiCoffee #WinterBlend
multilingual.fiSample:
Talven lämpöä suoraan Helsingistä

Tämän viikon talvisekoitus yhdistää pienet tilat ja isot maut—paahdettu täällä, toimitettuna kotiin pääkaupunkiseudulla ilman toimituskuluja.

Katso tarina Storiesissa. ☕ #HelsinkiKahvi #Talvisekoitus

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Workspace preferences, notifications, and accessibility.
settings.emailPublished: Email when a campaign is published
settings.fontHint: Increases base UI text; contrast meets WCAG on default theme.

onboarding.welcomeBody: GEO Studio helps you create multilingual, brand-aligned marketing content tuned for local search—without jargon.
onboarding.brandBody: Tell us your industry and tone once—we’ll keep voice consistent everywhere.
onboarding.geoBody: Set where you compete and which languages you publish in.
onboarding.doneBody: Open Content Generator from the left to start with prompts, GEO fields, and bilingual tabs.
onboarding.doneTip: Look for the small “?” hints next to important fields— they explain what the AI uses.
